LanguageData.ESCP_GrahlTusk.description: A grahl's tusk. It is very durable and valuable. While somewhat unwieldy as a melee weapon, it can still be deadly. Traders and collectors might pay a high price for this.
LanguageData.ESCP_UderfrykteTusk.description: An udyrfrykte 's tusk. It is very durable and valuable, and works reasonably well as a weapon.
